title: Imperial Plaza Hotel
content:
{{Top|leg}}
The '''Imperial Plaza Hotel''' was located in [[Montrol City]] on [[Gandle Ott]]. In addition to its rooms, [[Cantina/Legends|bars]], and restaurants, the [[Hotel/Legends|hotel]] also contained a [[Casino/Legends|casino]]. It played host to the [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]] delegation from the ''[[FarStar]]'', who stayed there at the government's expense. During their stay, several [[Droid/Legends|droids]] working in the hotel had their programming modified by [[CUTH-BRT-92-X3|Cuthbert]], causing them to slip drugs into the food and drink served to the crew of the ''FarStar''.

==Appearances==
